raw:
## Completed
Applied requested AskUserQuestion changes:
- Back/forward question navigation with all headers visible and current question indicated.
- Per-selected-choice notes plus existing whole-question note.
- Return shape now includes `choiceNotes` keyed by option label.
- Pure logic/tests updated for choice-note set/clear, whole-question note, and navigation state.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts` - interactive dialog/navigation/per-choice note UI using `ctx.ui.custom` and `Container/Text/Input`.
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/logic.ts` - pure exported selection, notes, result, and navigation logic.
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh` - expanded unit coverage.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh`

## Notes
Verification passed locally.
